nodes.name: getting median of age and fare

parameters.jsCode:
let items = $input.first().json.items
let age_median = $input.first().json.age_median
let fare_median = $input.first().json.fare_median
for (const e of items) {
  if(e.json.age == null) e.json.age = age_median
  if(e.json.fare == null) e.json.fare = fare_median
}

return items

main.node: getting median of age and fare
